zh.lifeSummary: 當Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II於1185年出生在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫希斯特爾時，他的父親Jan van Gistel0歲，母親De Gramines36歲。他於1208年與Marie de Rozebeke de Haveskercke結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1257年8月3日享年72歲。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II was born in 1185, in Gistel, West Flanders, Belgium, his father, Jan van Gistel, was 0 and his mother, De Gramines, was 36. He married Marie de Rozebeke de Haveskercke in 1208. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 3 August 1257, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II est né en 1185, à Gistel, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, son père, Jan van Gistel, avait 0 ans et sa mère, De Gramines, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Marie de Rozebeke de Haveskercke en 1208. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 août 1257, à l’âge de 72 ans.

Er hat 1208 Marie de Rozebeke de Haveskercke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. August 1257 im Alter von 72 Jahren.

Lui sposato Marie de Rozebeke de Haveskercke nel 1208. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 agosto 1257, all'età di 72 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II(이)가 1185년 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 지스텔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jan van Gistel(은)는 0세였고, 그의 어머니 De Gramines(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1208년 Marie de Rozebeke de Haveskercke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1257년 8월 3일 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II nasceu em 1185, em Gistel, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, seu pai, Jan van Gistel, tinha 0 anos e sua mãe, De Gramines, tinha 36 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wauthier de Hallewyl de Vormezelles II родился в 1185 г. в местности гистел, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Jan van Gistel было 0 лет, а матери, которую звали De Gramines, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie de Rozebeke de Haveskercke в 1208 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 3 августа 1257 г. в возрасте 72 лет.
